title: MedlinePlus: About MedlinePlus
content: About MedlinePlus MedlinePlus is an online health information resource for patients and their families and friends. General Information about MedlinePlus Description & history Using MedlinePlus Policies, training, & help Information for Developers Web service, data files, & linking MedlinePlus is a service of the National Library of Medicine (NLM), the world's largest medical library, which is part of the National Institutes of Health (NIH). Our mission is to present high-quality, relevant health and wellness information that is trusted, easy to understand, and free of advertising, in both English and Spanish. Anywhere, anytime, on any deviceâfor free.
